title: Setting a Default Landing Page at the Global Level
excerpt: Is there a way to set a default landing page for all users at a global level?  I am an account admin but do not see where it can be configured.

posts.author: ajhale21 (Amie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to set a default landing page for all users at a global level? I am an account admin but do not see where it can be configured.
